name: Sukiyaki
recipeIngredient: 10.6 oz package Mori-Nu Lite tofu (or any low fat tofu)
1 cup green onions, cut into 2-inch lengths
1 cup celery, cut diagonally into 3/4-inch pieces
1 cup Chinese cabbage, bok choy, or green cabbage
1/4 cup salt-reduced shoyu / soy sauce / tamari
1/2 cup sugar (if using mirin, reduce to 1/3 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick pan, saute green onions and celery in soy sauce and mirin until lightly browned.
2. Add cabbage and cook until it begins to wilt.
3. Add the drained sukiyaki no tomo, tofu, and remaining ingredients.
4. Stir gently for about 3 minutes, being careful not to overcook the vegetables.
5. Serve with brown rice.
This recipe serves 2 people.
